title: LambdaBetterGrass x Regions Unexplored
description: Compatability pack between LambdaBetterGrass and Regions Unexplored
body:
# LambdaBetterGrass x Regions Unexplored

This resource pack establishes compatibility between LambdaBetterGrass and Regions Unexplored, by providing data files in order to procedurally generate grass-like block textures, in accordance with the LambdaBetterGrass API.

## Requirements

- [LambdaBetterGrass](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdabettergrass)
- [Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored)

## Supporting
I do not accept donations, but if you really like this resource pack, please feel free to follow me on [GitHub](https://github.com/cph101)
